tailored_resume_content:
# SHREY BISHNOI
+1 (623) 498-7996 | shreybishnoi.dev@gmail.com | [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/shreybishnoi) | [GitHub](https://github.com/shreybishnoi)
## SUMMARY
Software Engineer and MS Computer Science student with 2+ years of experience in building and maintaining production backend and full-stack systems, proficient in Java, Python, and cloud computing.
## EDUCATION
**Arizona State University (GPA: 4.11/4.0)** | **Aug 2025 – May 2027**
*Master of Science, Computer Science* | Tempe, AZ, USA
**Maharaja Agrasen Institute of Technology (GPA: 3.7/4.0)** | **Aug 2019 – Jul 2023**
*Bachelor of Science, Computer Science and Engineering* | New Delhi, India
## SKILLS
*   **Languages:** Java, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, C++, SQL
*   **Backend & APIs:** RESTful services, OOP design, data modeling, ETL pipelines, performance optimization
*   **Frontend:** React, Vue.js-style frameworks, HTML, CSS
*   **Databases & Systems:** PostgreSQL, MySQL, Kafka, RocksDB, Neo4j
*   **Tools & Platforms:** Git, Docker, Kubernetes (Minikube), AWS (EC2, RDS), Linux, CI/CD
## EXPERIENCE
**Software Engineer | ZS Associates** | **Sep 2023 – Jun 2025**
*   Owned and maintained 5+ production backend services using Python, Node.js, and PostgreSQL, supporting analytics workflows for 3+ product and data teams and enabling reliable data delivery at scale.
*   Optimized data-intensive REST APIs by tuning SQL queries, adding indexes, and refactoring service logic, reducing report latency by 40% and improving overall system responsiveness.
**Software Engineer Intern | Dreadnought School** | **Jun 2022 – Aug 2022**
*   Implemented backend features using strong OOP principles and data structures within a client-server architecture, contributing to 10+ feature modules with clean, maintainable service design.

tailored_resume_markdown:
SHREY BISHNOI
+1 (623) 498-7996 — sbishno2@asu.edu — linkedin.com/in/shrey-bishnoi/ — github.com/shrey-Bish

SUMMARY
Highly motivated MS Computer Science student with 2+ years of experience in backend and full-stack development, seeking a Software Developer Intern role. Proficient in Java, React, RESTful APIs, and cloud platforms like AWS, with a strong foundation in object-oriented design, data structures, and scalable system architecture. Eager to contribute to multi-tenant cloud-based applications within an Agile SDLC.

EDUCATION
**Arizona State University** (GPA: 4.11/4.0)
Master of Science, Computer Science
Tempe, AZ, USA
Aug 2025 – May 2027

**Maharaja Agrasen Institute of Technology** (GPA: 3.7/4.0)
Bachelor of Science, Computer Science and Engineering
New Delhi, India
Aug 2019 – Jul 2023

SKILLS
*   **Languages:** Java, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, C++, SQL
*   **Backend & APIs:** RESTful services, OOP design, data modeling, ETL pipelines, performance optimization, microservices
*   **Frontend:** React, Vue.js-style frameworks, HTML, CSS
*   **Databases & Systems:** PostgreSQL, MySQL, Kafka, RocksDB, Neo4j
*   **Tools & Platforms:** AWS (EC2, RDS), Git, Docker, Kubernetes (Minikube), Linux, CI/CD
*   **Practices:** Agile SDLC, code reviews, testing, documentation, analytical problem-solving

EXPERIENCE
**Software Engineer** — ZS Associates
Sep 2023 – Jun 2025
*   Owned and maintained 5+ production backend services using Python, Node.js, and PostgreSQL, supporting analytics workflows for 3+ product and data teams and enabling reliable data delivery at scale.
*   Optimized data-intensive REST APIs by tuning SQL queries, adding indexes, and refactoring service logic, reducing report latency by 40% and improving overall system responsiveness.
*   Automated ETL pipelines in Python and SQL and built 3+ internal React dashboards for monitoring system health, data freshness, and KPIs, cutting manual analyst effort by 40% and improving operational visibility.

**Software Engineer Intern** — Dreadnought School
Jun 2022 – Aug 2022
*   Implemented backend features using strong OOP principles and data structures within a client–server architecture, contributing to 10+ feature modules with clean, maintainable service design.
*   Designed and consumed HTTP/REST APIs, gaining hands-on experience with request lifecycles, validation, and error handling while working with PostgreSQL/MySQL across multiple relational schemas.
*   Developed responsive UI components using modern JavaScript frameworks (Vue.js-style patterns) and collaborated using Git in a 5+ member team, gaining exposure to CI/CD pipelines, cloud deployments, and Agile workflows.

**Full-Stack Developer Intern** — Andwemet Pvt Ltd
Jun 2021 – Oct 2021
*   Built a customer-facing onboarding system using the MERN stack, designing and implementing frontend user flows while developing backend APIs to handle user data, validation, and onboarding logic for 100+ active users.
*   Improved onboarding efficiency through iterative UI refinements and backend performance improvements, reducing onboarding time by 35% and increasing feature adoption by 50% based on user interaction patterns.

**Teaching Assistant** — Coding Ninjas
Jun 2022 – Sep 2022
*   Spearheaded mentorship program for 100+ students in C++ data structures and algorithms, offering guidance on core concepts and reducing student debugging time by 15% through personalized code reviews.
*   Reviewed 200+ code submissions, identified logical errors and edge cases, and explained trade-offs and optimizations clearly, helping students improve correctness, performance, and coding discipline.

PROJECTS
**Real-Time Graph Analytics System** — Kafka, RocksDB, Neo4j, Docker, Kubernetes
*   Designed a distributed analytics system ingesting high-throughput event streams via Kafka, enabling scalable, fault-tolerant real-time data processing across multiple containerized services.
*   Managed application state using RocksDB and executed graph algorithms with Neo4j, deploying services using Docker and Kubernetes to achieve 2× throughput under concurrent workloads.

**Gym Occupancy Tracker** — Next.js, Supabase, PostgreSQL, REST APIs
*   Engineered a real-time gym occupancy platform used by live users to estimate crowd levels throughout the day, designing a privacy-first data model with anonymous device hashes to support check-ins, automatic check-outs, and user surveys.
*   Implemented a decay-based aggregation algorithm to compute stable occupancy percentages from raw event data, computing all metrics on-demand (no cron jobs) while handling timezone-aware logic and enforcing rate-limiting to prevent abuse.
cover_letter:
Shrey Bishnoi
+1 (623) 498-7996
sbishno2@asu.edu
linkedin.com/in/shrey-bishnoi/

[Date]

Hiring Team
Octave

Dear Octave Hiring Team,

I am writing to express my enthusiastic interest in the Software Developer Intern position at Octave, as advertised on your careers page. As an MS Computer Science student with over two years of hands-on experience in backend and full-stack development, I am eager to apply my skills and contribute to your innovative multi-tenant cloud-based Java application.

My academic background at Arizona State University, combined with practical experience, has equipped me with a strong foundation in object-oriented design, data structures, and scalable system architecture. I possess working knowledge of Java, React, and RESTful APIs, which directly aligns with the core technologies mentioned in the job description. My experience at ZS Associates involved maintaining production backend services and optimizing REST APIs, while my projects, such as the "Gym Occupancy Tracker" (Next.js, PostgreSQL, REST APIs) and "Real-Time Graph Analytics System" (Kafka, Docker, Kubernetes), demonstrate my ability to design and deploy robust, cloud-ready solutions.

I am particularly drawn to Octave's mission-critical software and commitment to innovation. I am a self-motivated, results-oriented individual with strong problem-solving abilities, keen to learn new technologies, and collaborate with senior developers in a fast-paced environment. I am confident that my technical proficiency in AWS, Python, Git, and my familiarity with Agile methodologies would allow me to make meaningful contributions to your team.

Thank you for considering my application. I have attached my resume for your review and welcome the opportunity to discuss how my skills and passion for software development can benefit Octave.

Sincerely,
Shrey Bishnoi

My background includes developing and maintaining production backend services and building scalable, distributed systems, which I believe aligns well with your multi-tenant cloud-based Java application environment.

I am highly motivated, eager to learn, and ready to contribute to your team. My resume, attached for your convenience, provides further detail on my qualifications and projects.

Thank you for your time and consideration.
